title: Fetch and display open ICDex orders panel

requirements.text: Add a public query function `getOpenOrders()` to the backend Motoko actor that calls the ICDex canister at 'jgxow-pqaaa-aaaar-qahaq-cai' to fetch the canister's currently open orders and returns them as an array of records containing orderId (Nat), side (Text), price (Nat), and quantity (Nat). This function must be self-contained and must not modify any existing functions.

quotes: Apenas buscar as ordens e exibir

acceptanceCriteria: A public function `getOpenOrders()` exists in backend/main.mo
The function calls the ICDex canister at 'jgxow-pqaaa-aaaar-qahaq-cai' to retrieve open orders
The function returns an array of records with fields: orderId (Nat), side (Text), price (Nat), quantity (Nat)
No existing functions (tradingLoop, startBot, stopBot, etc.) are modified

requirements.text: Add a React Query hook `useOpenOrders()` to `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` that calls the backend `getOpenOrders()` function and polls every 10 seconds, following the same pattern as existing hooks in that file.

quotes: Apenas buscar as ordens e exibir

acceptanceCriteria: A `useOpenOrders` hook is added to useQueries.ts
The hook calls backend `getOpenOrders()` via the actor
The hook exposes loading, error, and data states

requirements.text: Create a new `OpenOrdersPanel` React component in `frontend/src/components/OpenOrdersPanel.tsx` that displays the open orders fetched from ICDex in a table with columns: Order ID, Side (BUY/SELL with neon green / red accent badges consistent with the terminal theme), Price, and Quantity. Show a loading skeleton while fetching, an error message on failure, and an empty state message when there are no open orders. Add this panel to the dashboard grid in `frontend/src/App.tsx`.

quotes: Apenas buscar as ordens e exibir

acceptanceCriteria: OpenOrdersPanel.tsx component exists and renders a table of open orders
Table columns are: Order ID, Side, Price, Quantity
BUY rows use neon green accent; SELL rows use red accent — consistent with the existing terminal theme
A loading skeleton is displayed while data is being fetched
An error state message is shown on fetch failure
An empty state message is shown when no open orders are returned
The panel is added to the dashboard grid in App.tsx
Data refreshes every 10 seconds via the useOpenOrders hook

constraints: Do not modify tradingLoop(), startBot(), stopBot(), or any other existing backend functions
Do not implement any cancellation or grid repositioning logic
Frontend immutable paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui) must not be modified
New React Query hook must follow the existing pattern in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts
nonGoals: Comparing open orders against the computed grid
Any modification to the trading loop cycle
